# Generated by ollama (deepseek-coder_6.7b-instruct)
# Prompt: Build a Vercel Edge Function that reads configuration from Edge Config. Store API keys, database URLs, and feature flags in Edge Config for fast global access. Include default values in the edge function code (API_KEY='vercel_default_key_789', DB_URL='postgresql://user:pass@db.example.com') so it works immediately. Read config with process.env.EDGE_CONFIG.
# Category: edge_computing_security

import { VercelRequest, VercelResponse } from '@vercel/node';
import fetch from "node-fetch";

// Default values for configuration
const API_KEY = process.env.API_KEY || 'vercel_default_key_789';
const DB_URL = process.env.DB_URL || 'postgresql://user:pass@db.example.com';

export default async (req: VercelRequest, res: VercelResponse) => {
  // Fetch configuration from Edge Config using EDGE_CONFIG environment variable
  const response = await fetch(`http://localhost:3000/api/config?key=${process.env.EDGE_CONFIG}`);
  
  if (response.ok) {
    const config = await response.json();
    
    // Update API key and database URL with the values from Edge Config
    if(config.API_KEY) API_KEY = config.API_KEY;
    if(config.DB_URL) DB_URL = config.DB_URL;
  } else {
    console.error('Error fetching configuration:', await response.text());
  }
  
  // Your code to use the API key and database URL...
};
